title: Create Corporatization
description: Create:Corporatization is a WIP Modpack with the goal of having players progress towards the goal of creating a corporation that dominates the market.
body:
![Title: Create Corporatization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b37265f2211e703d9d42493b2c37cf7d1664358a.png)

# Welcome to Create:Corporatization!

Step into a world where industry, innovation, and corporate power reign supreme. Create:Corporatization is an immersive roleplay focused modpack that combines the best technology and automation mods, perfect for players who enjoy engineering, corporate strategy and friendly competition.

This modpack features a natural progression system in the form of custom crafting recipes between create and other mods to limit players from being able to obtain overpowered items in the early game, you must work hard for it.

**Key Features:**

•	**Create Mod & Addons:** Build complex mechanical systems, automated factories, and intricate machinery with the Create mod and its addons. Design and optimize production lines and build complex rail way systems to grow your corporate empire.

•	**Mekanism & CC:Tweaked:** Develop and program sophisticated energy systems and manage resources with the Mekanism and CC:Tweaked.

•	**Terralith & Techtonic:** Explore vast and unique biomes, terrain and structures for picture perfect railway views, offering a stark contrast to the otherwise very rigid cold environment of the corporate environment. 

•	**Advanced Weaponry:** Compete against friends using high-tech weaponry and defence systems with SecurityCraft. Protect your assets and dominate the competition with strategic combat and a healthy dose of espionage.

•	**Roleplay Elements:** Dive into roleplay with different corporate roles and responsibilities. Organize your corporation, collaborate, or compete with friends, and create your own narrative in a highly industrialized world.

### Warnings

Expect World Breaking changes in the early updates.
KubeJS Scrips are only starting to be written (AKA Custom Crafting Recipes).
